name: NexusFlow
description: Architected a production-grade inventory and order management platform implementing transactional order processing, stock validation, and ACID-compliant business workflows.
Designed scalable system architecture using cache-aside patterns, automatic cache invalidation, repository-service design, and Docker-based deployments.

name: BeyondEvent
description: Designed an event-driven architecture simulation platform that lets developers model distributed systems, create service topologies, and visualize asynchronous event flows through an interactive graph-based editor.
Implemented topology management, event persistence, and real-time event streaming with Socket.IO, distributed tracing, and replay capabilities on a modular event bus architecture.
